01Why now

AI is melting your rack.Legacy cooling can’t keep up.

02The mismatch

Your AC ONLY handles 120kW.

  • 1 AI rack demands 132kW. You’re already underwater.
  • Most buildings are maxed before they even start.
  • Air conditioning was designed for offices, not AI.
03The unit

Meet Vega.

    04Any environment

    One system, any facility.

    Retrofits to your exact building.

    • High-density AI & data centers.
    • Hospitals & healthcare.
    • Research & university labs.
    • Industrial & manufacturing.
    • Brownfield retrofits & legacy buildings.
    • Anywhere heat is the bottleneck.
    05The math

    Cooling shouldn’t cost compute.

    $3.9M per AI rack. Every month it runs throttled, you’re burning compute.

    100kW

    Multiple vendors.→One responsible system.

    Cools the room.→Cools the rack.
    30% overhead on cooling.→That power back to compute.

    One project. One quote.

    06Talk to engineering

    Get cooling.
